name: Szechuan Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 14 cups broccoli florets (from 2 heads of broccoli)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the water, sherry, soy sauce, hoisin and cornstarch; set aside.
2. Cut the broccoli heads into florets; peel the stems and slice thin. Set aside.
3. Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add ginger, garlic, and red pepper flakes; cook, stirring, for 30 seconds.
4. Add broccoli to the pan; cook, stirring, until tender-crisp, about 5 minutes.
5. Pour in the sauce mixture; stir to coat the broccoli. Cook for 1 minute more.
6. Stir in sesame oil.
